overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit night market district. The character moves from a covered arcade through an open plaza with steam vents, then approaches a street food vendor where an interaction is taking place. The environment features heavy neon lighting, traditional Asian-inspired market architecture mixed with futuristic elements, and various NPCs populating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market arcade with hanging lanterns

events.description: approaching exit of covered arcade, steam from open plaza becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow market corridor past standing pedestrians near food stalls

notable_agents.action: two women standing by food stall, one wearing green top and white shorts, the other in dark top with glowing green shorts

entered.detail: overhead roof structure of the covered market arcade
traditional red paper lanterns hanging in rows from ceiling
metal counter with food preparation items and packaging
glowing neon signs in various colors advertising businesses

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered market arcade illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon signs. Two women stand by a food stall on the left. The corridor opens ahead into a steamy plaza visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with ground steam vents and digital advertisements

events.description: exits covered arcade into open plaza with visible steam rising from ground vents
character slows pace while approaching street vendor area ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across open plaza toward distant vendor, navigating around steam vents

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green jacket walking while looking at phone device

entered.detail: ground-level vent emitting white steam into the plaza
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade
wide staircase leading up to building entrance with bollards
street food cart with glowing blue light visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered arcade into an open plaza filled with ground-level steam vents and bathed in neon light from surrounding digital billboards. The character walks toward a street vendor cart visible in the distance while other pedestrians move through the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor setup with customer seating and illuminated signage

events.description: character stops walking and begins observing vendor-customer interaction
vendor gestures with hands while talking to seated customer

agents.ego_description: standing near food vendor observing interaction between vendor in trench coat and seated customer

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing trench coat and hat, standing and gesturing while holding food container
customer in white tank top and cap sitting in blue plastic chair, holding tablet device

entered.detail: bright blue plastic chair where customer is seated
tall vertical sign with red Japanese-inspired characters glowing brightly
screen mounted on wall displaying news broadcast with talking head
metal cart with blue neon lighting and cooking equipment

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and observes a street food vendor setup. A vendor in a trench coat stands gesturing near a glowing blue food cart, while a customer sits in a blue plastic chair holding a tablet. The area is lit by a large vertical illuminated sign with red text and a wall-mounted TV showing a news broadcast.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, lantern-lit market corridor into a wide, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins by trailing the character through a narrow covered arcade illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon signs, passing two women at a food stall. As the character moves forward, the corridor opens up and the scene shifts into an expansive plaza filled with ground-level steam vents and the glow of towering digital billboards. The camera then tracks the character across the open space through a crowd of pedestrians, steadily approaching a street food vendor. Finally, the view settles on a vendor in a trench coat gesturing by a glowing blue cart, positioned beneath a large vertical red sign and a wall-mounted TV broadcasting the news.
